title: fix: route deepseek pro through fireworks
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: A smoother flight for DeepSeek Pro
gist.blurb: We've rerouted DeepSeek Pro through Fireworks to keep the responses flowing smoothly. No more traffic jams, just pure, uninterrupted generation.
gist.summary: Updated the routing for the deepseek-pro model to use Fireworks instead of DeepInfra, updating the registry provider and context length accordingly.
gist.impact: Users will experience significantly better reliability and fewer interruptions when generating text with deepseek-pro.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a cute firework rocket to symbolize the new Fireworks provider routing for the DeepSeek Pro model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny safety goggles, happily lighting a small, colorful firework rocket on a launchpad. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny safety goggles, happily lighting a small, colorful firework rocket on a launchpad. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
